summary: Hydrated state shows the representative #55619 is not merge-ready and is no longer the best path. #68865 is the best repairable non-security contributor PR for the Feishu WebSocket app-layer reconnect path, but it still has unresolved P1 bot findings. The already-open replacement #72411 is security-sensitive because Aisle reported potential sensitive log exposure, so it is quarantined only and not used as the canonical fix. Planned result: keep #68865 as canonical repair path, build a repair artifact, block superseded/fixed-by closeout until the fix is clean, and route #72411 to central security handling.

actions.reason: Related issue remains open because it has concrete reproduction details and possible domain-scope nuance; closeout is premature until the canonical repaired fix lands.
